questions.question: What is the primary goal of Natural Language Processing (NLP)?

questions.question: Which of the following best describes the origins of NLP?
options: Development of computational linguistics in the 1950s
Evolution of machine learning algorithms in the 1980s
Expansion of artificial intelligence research in the 1990s

questions.question: What is the primary difference between human language and machine-generated text?
questions.hint: Discuss the complexities of human language and NLP applications
